title: Blackspur - Iron Corner Mending Plates - 37mm - Pack of 12
features: These L shaped angle supports with screw holes are manufactured from galvanized iron & easy to install with 36 screws supplied.
They are ideal for use in a variety of DIY applications such as reinforcing or repairing tables, cabinets, chairs, shelves or any other home furniture.
